title: Insert Delete GetRandom O(1)
hints: To achieve O(1) average time for all operations, you need a data structure that supports fast random access and a hash map for O(1) lookups.
Use a dynamic array (like a list or vector) to store values for O(1) random access and a hash map to store each value's index in the array.
When removing a value, swap it with the last element in the array, update the hash map for the swapped element, then remove the last element to maintain O(1) complexity.
